docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY BEGUN, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT BALDRIGE, VALERIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2025 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-20-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT UNAVAILABLE DURING CIVIC CENTER POWER OUTAGE. NO APPEARANCES. (506)
